HGSS.517.0000:
I am Bruno of the Elite Four.\f
I always train to the extreme because
I believe in our potential.\f
That is how we became strong.
Can you withstand our power?\f
Hm? I see no fear in you. You look
determined. Perfect for battle!\f
Ready, [0103,0000,0000]?\f
You will bow down to our
overwhelming power!\f
Hoo hah!\f
HGSS.517.0001:
Having lost, I have no right to
say anything...\r
Go face your next challenge!\f
